label: uuid
labelDescription: The unique job identifier

label: hits.name
labelDescription: Name of the target (sequence for phmmer/hmmsearch, HMM for hmmscan).

label: hits.acc
labelDescription: Accession of the target.

label: hits.acc2
labelDescription: Secondary accession of the target.

label: hits.id
labelDescription: Identifier of the target.

label: hits.desc
labelDescription: Description of the target.

label: hits.score
labelDescription: Bit score of the sequence (all domains, without correction)

label: hits.pvalue
labelDescription: P-value of the score.

label: hits.evalue
labelDescription: E-value of the score.

label: hits.nregions
labelDescription: Number of regions evaluated.

label: hits.nenvelopes
labelDescription: Number of envelopes handed over for domain definition, null2, alignment, and scoring.

label: hits.ndom
labelDescription: Total number of domains identified in this sequence.

label: hits.nreported
labelDescription: Number of domains satisfying reporting thresholding.

label: hits.nincluded
labelDescription: Number of domains satisfying inclusion thresholding.

label: hits.taxid
labelDescription: The NCBI taxonomy identifier of the target (if applicable).

label: hits.species
labelDescription: The species name of the target (if applicable).

label: hits.kg
labelDescription: The kingdom of life that the target belongs to - based on placing in the NCBI taxonomy tree (if applicable).

label: domains.ienv
labelDescription: Envelope start position.

label: domains.jenv
labelDescription: Envelope end position.

label: domains.iali
labelDescription: Alignment start position.

label: domains.jali
labelDescription: Alignment end position.

label: domains.bias
labelDescription: null2 score contribution.

label: domains.oasc
labelDescription: Optimal alignment accuracy score.

label: domains.bitscore
labelDescription: Overall score in bits, null corrected, if this were the only domain in seq.

label: domains.cevalue
labelDescription: Conditional E-value based on the domain correction.

label: domains.ievalue
labelDescription: Independent E-value based on the domain correction.

label: domains.is_reported
labelDescription: 1 if domain meets reporting thresholds.

label: domains.is_included
labelDescription: 1 if domain meets inclusion thresholds.

label: domains.alimodel
labelDescription: Aligned query consensus sequence phmmer and hmmsearch, target hmm for hmmscan.

label: domains.alimline
labelDescription: Match line indicating identities, conservation +’s, gaps.

label: domains.aliaseq
labelDescription: Aligned target sequence for phmmer and hmmsearch, query for hmmscan.

label: domains.alippline
labelDescription: Posterior probability annotation.

label: domains.alihmmname
labelDescription: Name of HMM (query sequence for phmmer, alignment for hmmsearch and target hmm for hmmscan).

label: domains.alihmmacc
labelDescription: Accession of HMM.

label: domains.alihmmdesc
labelDescription: Description of HMM.

label: domains.alihmmfrom
labelDescription: Start position on HMM.

label: domains.alihmmto
labelDescription: End position on HMM.

label: domains.aliM
labelDescription: Length of model.

label: domains.alisqname
labelDescription: Name of target sequence (phmmer, hmmscan) or query sequence(hmmscan).

label: domains.alisqacc
labelDescription: Accession of sequence.

label: domains.alisqdesc
labelDescription: Description of sequence.

label: domains.alisqfrom
labelDescription: Start position on sequence.

label: domains.alisqto
labelDescription: End position on sequence.

label: domains.aliL
labelDescription: Length of sequence.

label: properties.molecular.weight
labelDescription: sum of the masses of each atom constituting a molecule (Da) using the same formulas and weights as ExPASy's.

label: properties.charge
labelDescription: net charge of a protein sequence based on the Henderson-Hasselbalch equation using Lehninger pKa scale.

label: properties.pI
labelDescription: isoelectric point calculated as in EMBOSS PEPSTATS.

label: properties.mz
labelDescription: mass over charge ratio (m/z) for peptides, as measured in mass spectrometry.

label: properties.aIndex
labelDescription: aliphatic index of a protein. The aindex is defined as the relative volume occupied by aliphatic side chains (Alanine, Valine, Isoleucine, and Leucine). It may be regarded as a positive factor for the increase of thermostability of globular proteins.

label: properties.boman
labelDescription: potential protein interaction index . The index is equal to the sum of the solubility values for all residues in a sequence, it might give an overall estimate of the potential of a peptide to bind to membranes or other proteins as receptors, to normalize it is divided by the number of residues. A protein have high binding potential if the index value is higher than 2.48.

label: properties.hydrophobicity
labelDescription: GRAVY hydrophobicity index of an amino acids sequence using KyteDoolittle hydophobicity scale.

label: properties.instaIndex
labelDescription: Guruprasad's instability index. This index predicts the stability of a protein based on its amino acid composition, a protein whose instability  index is smaller than 40 is predicted as stable, a value above 40 predicts   that the protein may be unstable.

label: properties.STYNQW
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (S + T + Y + N + Q + W)

label: properties.Tiny
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (A + C + G + S + T)

label: properties.Small
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (A + B + C + D + G + N + P + S + T + V)

label: properties.Aliphatic
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (A + I + L + V)

label: properties.Aromatic
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (F + H + W + Y)

label: properties.NonPolar
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (A + C + F + G + I + L + M + P + V + W + Y)

label: properties.Polar
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (D + E + H + K + N + Q + R + S + T + Z)

label: properties.Charged
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (B + D + E + H + K + R + Z)

label: properties.Basic
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (H + K + R)

label: properties.Acidic
labelDescription: Percentage of amino acids (B + D + E + Z)
